established_patterns.deps_struct: actionUpdateDeps pkg/cli/update_actions.go:37. Test-seam-var successor: field-of-funcs, defaultDeps() ctor, tests overwrite fields. R17.
established_patterns.syscall_discard_def: Defensible IFF (a)callee logs (b)best-effort doc (c)cleanup-defer w/primary err (d)impossible-at-init. #aw_sg14a1 meets NONE
established_patterns.implicit_defer_anti: `defer fn(args)` returning err implicitly discards. Fix: `defer func(){ _ = fn(args) }()`
established_patterns.build_tag_dup_anti: Pure-value decls duped across !js,!wasm should hoist to untagged
established_patterns.test_seam_fnvar_anti: `var X = func(...) { return realFn(...) }`. Fix: deps struct. RESOLVED R17.
established_patterns.panic_def: Idiomatic exemptions in linter (R19): sync.Once.Do funcLit, BUG: prefix (incl fmt.Sprintf), top-level init() (no receiver), doc-comment 'panics on/if'. Enforced.
established_patterns.named_duration: Sleep policies in named time.Duration constants. Ex: APICallCooldown, trialRepoInitDelay. R18 universal in pkg/cli/.
established_patterns.ci_linter_enforce: cgo.yml:1041 POSITIVE selector LINTER_FLAGS="-X -test=false". As of R19: `-errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode`. To enforce new analyzer: append `-name`.
established_patterns.type_assert_safe: Safe contexts for single-value .(T): (a) sync.Map/Pool callbacks (b) Immediately after literal construction (c) go/analysis pass.ResultOf (d) type-switch. Other sites at trust boundaries (API/YAML/JSON) need `, ok`.
established_patterns.fmt_errorf_w_discipline: 1404 fmt.Errorf in pkg/, %w universal. Multi-%w used at update_actions.go:291 and download_workflow.go:183. errors.New(fmt.Sprintf(...)) banned by convention (zero hits).
established_patterns.manual_unlock_anti_R19: Lock + manual Unlock leaks mutex on panic. Trivial Lock-read-Unlock (2 lines, no calls) is the only defensible exception. #aw_sg19a1 fix-options: (1) defer+func wrapper, (2) refine linter w/ exemption, (3) //nolint.
